subject: english
title: Unit 8 Reading — Hide and Seek (Geocaching)
subtitle: v1 · Leo's First Geocache Hunt spine · 44 slides · TR 8.7 passage presented verbatim · Reading Strategy: Identify Sequence of Events · pre-taught vocab → no ambush · DO not REVEAL · uses buildDndSorter for Wrap Up importance sort

content: Read to learn about a new hobby (geocaching).
Talk about the steps of a hobby.
Put a sequence of steps in order.
language: Use the Reading Strategy: Identify Sequence of Events.
Recognize and use signal words: first, next, before, after, then, finally, last.
Use the academic word sequence to talk about ordered steps.
Read the content vocab in context: outdoor, hiders, seekers, treasure, app, clues, compass, ornament, sinking.
